Title: INSERT SELECT
Description: Execute a database query and add the resultset data rows into the existing table
Examples:
[ WITH
cte_alias
AS '('
SELECT_query
')'
  [,
cte_alias
AS '('
SELECT_query
')'] [, ... ] ]
   INSERT INTO [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_name
[ '('
column_name
[,
column_name
] [, ... ] ')' ]
SELECT_query
